Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer message, ticket category, and contact history.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all submitted Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form entries stored as HubSpot form submissions or contact records.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching specified keywords, pulling channel data, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Rapidly surfaces a large pool of relevant creators across the platform, replacing hours of manual channel research.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the stored creator list, outreach sequences, and prompt templates from Google Drive to initialize the campaign.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator by applying learned sequences and dynamic prompts to their profile data.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the configured sender account.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email threads, negotiation outcomes, and conversation templates to train the AI on past engagement patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds the AI in real negotiation history, enabling smarter, context-aware replies that reflect what has worked in previous creator deals.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or drafts the AI-generated negotiation response back to the creator within the existing email thread.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Reads the MHM vehicle data and cross-references it against the New Availability Guide to identify matched part numbers and build the weekly load sheet.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product data and brand guidelines as input.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth data, and email performance stats from HubSpot for the reporting period.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps by comparing R1 Concepts' current search performance against competitor ranking opportunities and underserved queries.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor names, PO numbers, due dates, and outstanding item quantities for follow-up processing.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Logs into Attentive via Chrome browser automation and locates the most recent MHM SMS campaign to use as the cloning source.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors William Nguyen's Teams channel for a newly uploaded Excel file each week containing the Super Session Saturday download asset.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates long-form B2B SEO blog content targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — using keyword-focused prompts and brand voice guidelines.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Gerrit Young uploads the monthly new arrivals file to Teams, triggering the agent to begin processing and distribution.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the current Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent entries, statuses, owners, and progress notes into a structured data payload.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Captures a complete, up-to-date snapshot of every agent's status automatically, eliminating the need to manually compile or copy data before a weekly review.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Transforms the raw sheet data into a clean, human-readable weekly update formatted for email — grouping agents by status, highlighting new completions, and surfacing blockers.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Turns a dense spreadsheet into a scannable executive summary in seconds, saving the time it would take to manually write and format a weekly team update.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Delivers the formatted weekly agent tracker update to the relevant team members or stakeholders.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Ensures everyone stays aligned on agent progress without requiring a meeting or manual report assembly, keeping leadership informed effortlessly.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification (make, model, year, and other relevant attributes) through a HubSpot form, triggering the downstream workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Gives Mark a simple, repeatable entry point that kicks off the entire catalog process instantly — no emails, no manual handoffs.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the DFC inventory database using the submitted vehicle spec to retrieve all stocked parts that fit the vehicle as well as any gaps in coverage.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls a complete, accurate inventory picture for any vehicle in seconds, replacing what would otherwise require manual lookups across the parts catalog.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Interprets the inventory query results and structures them into a clean, organized catalog layout distinguishing what DFC stocks versus what is missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a polished, decision-ready catalog format without any manual formatting work, saving significant prep time per vehicle request.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file for the requested vehicle, ready for use in customer conversations or sourcing decisions.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a fully formatted, vehicle-specific catalog directly to Mark within minutes of his request, enabling faster and more informed special markets outreach.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, returning on-hand quantities, on-order status, and in-transit data for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enriches the entire backorder report with real-time inventory intelligence automatically, replacing a process that currently requires a dozen people to do independent manual lookups.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Cross-references the live Dream data against the backorder list to enrich each row and flag parts with no available source as dead-end items requiring escalation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Produces a fully enriched, prioritized backorder report in one pass, giving the team immediate clarity on which parts can be fulfilled and which are true dead ends.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for flagged backorder items, giving the team ready-to-send updates for affected orders.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time spent writing individual customer status emails from hours to minutes, while ensuring consistent, professional communication across all affected orders.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, and year fitment data for all available two-piece rotor SKUs.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference in a fraction of the time it would take to manually browse three separate vendor catalogs.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify which vehicles DFC covers and where coverage gaps exist.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals competitive gaps and sourcing opportunities, giving Dino a clear picture of where DFC is winning and where demand may be unmet.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to target customers to gather demand data on vehicles where DFC currently lacks two-piece rotor coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real market demand signals from customers directly, helping DFC prioritize which coverage gaps are worth filling based on actual buyer interest.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped fitment data, cross-reference results, and demand responses into a single formatted output sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, clean reference document for the entire two-piece rotor market landscape — ready for sourcing and product decisions without any manual assembly.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy across campaigns, retrieving the full text of every ad field including headlines, body copy, and descriptions.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the complete live ad inventory in one pull, making it possible to scan thousands of ad variations instantly rather than reviewing placements one by one.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all retrieved ad copy for the specified target phrases and flags every exact match, noting the ad ID, campaign, field type, and the verbatim copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across the entire ad account in seconds, delivering precise, citation-level results that would take hours to audit manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged list to the requester showing each phrase match with its exact location — campaign, ad ID, and the specific copy field where it was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a complete, actionable compliance or quality report in the requester's inbox on demand, enabling fast decisions or copy corrections without any manual digging.

summary: The automation pipeline continues to grow strong, with 55 total agents now tracked — 27 completed, 11 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While things were quiet on the structural side, the depth and breadth of what's already live and actively running reflects a tremendous amount of work the team has put in. Stay tuned for more updates as the in-progress agents continue to move toward completion!
